name: Psykos
description: An esper and military advisor of the Monster Association.

name: Qingge Liu
description: Liu Qingge (柳清歌 Liǔ Qīnggē) is a cannon fodder character in Proud Immortal Demon's Way and a side character in Scum Villain's Self-Saving System. He is the Bai Zhan Peak Lord. In the original story of Proud Immortal Demon Way. Liu Qingge is hot-blooded, arrogant, and stubborn. He seems to highly value loyalty and strength. He is almost always seen fighting something, and he ardently hates demons. Due to his blunt personality, he can be hard to approach.

name: Raika Oda
description: __Height:__ 167 cm (5'6") Tama University School of Literature second year student. Well endowed, a very good cook in Japanese cuisine and the only female member in the club. She does not show emotion easily and does not talk much. She loves cute things, which will embarrass her and make her more strange than usual.
mediaTitles: Listen to Me, Girls. I Am Your Father!
Papa no Iukoto wo Kikinasai!: Pokkapoka
Papa no Iukoto wo Kikinasai! OVA

name: Rebecca Chambers
description: A child prodigy, Rebecca was entered into university at a young age and graduated with a Bachelor's degree in chemistry at the age of 18. Scouted for her talents by various groups, she found herself picked for the Special Tactics and Rescue Service, the special forces division of the Raccoon Police Department. Assigned to the Bravo Team, Chambers served as Rear Security and as its Medic, with her expertise making up for a lack of experience in combat.

name: Reiko Yanagi
description: Reiko is a quiet and emotionless teenager who often shows an odd body posture.

name: Ren Nikaidou
description: A boy with a bad reputation who lives in the dorms. He knows Ruka is a vampire and has vowed to protect Mito from him. ~!He is a dhampir, a child of a vampire and a human.!~

name: Rozé
description: ~!__Gender:__ Female!~ Roze is a laid back and cheerful individual, often speaking casually. He can be somewhat blunt, such as when he told Tomoomi that his dead Allie’s would prefer if he used the information they provided, but is apologized apon realizing that the comment was insensitive. ~!As Sakuya, she is more cold and calculating, acting with purpose to accomplish her goals. Her sole motivations are to rescue Sakura and get revenge on those responsible for the death of her parents. Despite
mediaTitles: Code Geass: Rozé of the Recapture
searchTerms: Code Geass: Rozé of the Recapture

name: Rulutieh
description: The youngest princess of Kujyuri, one of several countries that comprise the great empire of Yamato. While delicate and cripplingly shy, she is nonetheless charming, graceful, and down-to-earth. When Haku and his companions encounter her, she is accompanying her nation's tribute to the Mikado on its way to the Imperial Capital. Cares deeply for her pet hororon bird, Cocopo.

name: Ruruka Andou
description: __Height:__ 162 cm (5'4") __Talent:__ Ultimate Confectioner During her time in Class 76th at Hope's Peak Academy. In Future Arc, she is a member of the Future Foundation and is the Branch Office 8 Director. Her responsibility as the director is assistance in procuring stable food sources. She, along with the other Future Foundation Directors, is forced to participate in the Final Killing Game.
mediaTitles: Danganronpa 3: The End of Hope’s Peak High School - Future Arc
Danganronpa 3: The End of Hope’s Peak High School - Despair Arc

name: Ryouhei Hayashi
description: __Height:__ 176 cm He is the third division vice-captain of the Tokyo Manji Gang.

name: Ryouka Miketa
description: One of [Inori's](https://anilist.co/character/197151/Inori-Yuitsuka) rivals. She is a 3rd grade girl in the Preliminary skating category with Inori. She looks up to "girlish" things and believes cats are the cutest things in the universe.

name: Seiji Aino
description: Seiji is a more-or-less level headed individual, trying to please all the women around him without hurting them. He is a high school student and older brother of Akua Aino.

name: Shin Sawada
description: Shin is the leader of class 3-D. He is cool, level-headed, smart, and somewhat introverted. Everyone in the class looks up to him. Shin is feared because of an incident back in middle school, where he punched out a teacher who constantly persecuted a student he believed to have committed a crime, where later he was proven innocent the teacher refused to apologize. Shin knows right away that something is not normal about their new teacher and keeps an eye on her. He's the first one to find out Ya

name: Taiki Himekawa
description: Award-winning stage actor affiliated with the Lala Lai Theatrical Company.

name: Taiyou Ishigami
description: Taiyu Ishigami is a clumsy boy with a shy personality who plays tennis to deal with anxiety. He can't decide anything by himself.

name: Takeru Amaya
description: Amaya is one of the deuteragonists of Kamisama no Iutoori. He is violent, sadistic, brutal, blood-lusting, savage, and tyrannical individual who actively takes pleasure in the destruction of everything around him to an extreme extent.
mediaTitles: As the Gods Will: The Second Series
searchTerms: As the Gods Will: The Second Series

name: Taokaka
description: __Race:__ Kaka __Birthplace:__ Lost Town __Height:__ 165 cm A resident of the Kaka village and member of the Kaka tribe, Taokaka is a catgirl, wearing a large coat that obscures her true face, only exposing red eyes and a row of teeth (whether or not this is her true face is a mystery, but a background character in her level resembles Jubei much more than Taokaka does, meaning they are either a different gender or perhaps older.) She wants to get back the sky above her village, which was sealed

name: Tita Russell
description: __Affiliation__: Zeiss Central Factory, ~!Thors Military Branch Campus (Class IX, Miltary Finances)!~ __Nationality__: Liberlian The granddaughter of one of the three pioneers of The Orbment Revolution, Professor Albert Russell. She lived in the City of Zeiss, Liberl with her grandfather and is usually seen acting as her grandfather's assistant. Her parents are usually too busy traveling abroad so she is used to caring for herself. Considered a prodigy in orbal engineering from a very young age,
mediaTitles: Legend of the Heroes: Trails in the Sky
searchTerms: Legend of the Heroes: Trails in the Sky

name: Tobimaru
description: Tobimaru is Kotarou's dog; Whom, along with being a faithful companion, comes in handy quite a few times for both Nanashi and Kotarou.

name: Torako
description: A friend of Asagi's, surname unknown, who attends the same university. She smokes constantly and appears obsessed with being cool. Because of this, she sometimes gets annoyed with Yotsuba's antics, though she also admits to Koiwai she's not used to being around small children. Her name means "tiger" (虎, tora) "girl" (子, ko) and Yotsuba frequently calls her just Tora ("tiger"). She is the only member of the younger cast with a car.

name: Tsurayuki Rokuonji
description: A close friend of Kyouya Hashiba. Although displaying a lazy nature, he is a genius in writing scripts.

name: Twoearle
description: She's a white haired girl who came from another world that has been attacked by the "Ulitimaguil." Though, she has a high level of scientific and technical knowledge, she is very much a klutz where she would often do things or say things carelessly that gets her to be on the receiving end of Aika's ire. She likes Soji very much that she would often flirt around him in a very ridiculous manner, much to Aika's chagrin. She later on enrolled to Soji's school, where she is also his classmate and ado
